items.text:
Casting Call!!!

“Two pairs of Legs, Lennon and Lindsey embrace the challenging journey to explore if their continuous encounters really are just coincidences.”

Hello!  That was the logline of my short film which I’m currently directing called Legs! I am a student studying Film Practice at University Of the Arts London. 

Legs is a comedy based around a pair of Legs! Set in present day London we explore the nature of the invisible string theory. The film has heavy inspiration from Wes Anderson, LaLaLand, and the silent era. 

We are currently seeking two male dancers to take upon the role of Lennon (the main lead) and the ex-partner of the female lead (the antagonist). 

Legs is a dialogue free film due to its heavy inspiration from the silent era. Due to this these roles require actors to move very expressively with their legs, as the legs are the entire character's personality, emotions, and identity.

We will be shooting the film from the 23rd to the 30th of April. So, we ask to keep those days as available if you are interested. 

We are also seeking 2 voice actors, the male and female lead which will be crucial to communicate the emotions via non-verbal vocalisations. 

We will be recording voice acting the week after shooting.

If interested in more than just acting or just voice acting feel free to apply for both positions!

Most locations will be shot in the London borough of Southwark and food and travel will be covered. However, we have a very limited budget, so we are not able to pay any actors beyond that.  

But this will be a great opportunity to expand your portfolio, and work on a production where you will get to challenge yourself with something potentially new to you!

If you are interested contact me via this post or email my producer :

I.pugh0320251@arts.ac.uk

Instagram: @iolopzs

items.text:
EAST ASIAN MALE 50+

NO ACTING EXPERIENCE 

MUST BE AVAILABLE ON THE 30TH MARCH

PAID, BASED IN KINGSTON UPON THAMES 

We are looking for somebody to join The Divine Move, a short film where, after losing to an AI, the world’s greatest GO player must choose whether to accept his fate or play on. In order to defy destiny, he has to embrace what makes us human. 

You do not need any acting experience as this is a non-speaking role. You will be paid, and all expenses will be covered. Please contact thedivinemove2026@gmail.com

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL FOR A STUDENT PROJECT ‼️
Hi I’m a student at Weymouth College and this is for my final major project as a second year in college. 

Plot: The main character is in therapy talking about “the incident”, which brings us to a flashback. 

This character was having a regular day, making easy choices of which cereal to eat, which path to take to the shop, until they choose to litter, causing a bystander to step into the road leading to their death. We see a parent mourning at the hospital, before the flashback ends. 

Now, the therapists face is revealed and recognisable as the parent of the bystander. They wanted to capture the main characters confession on camera, this wasn’t a normal therapy session. Ends as we hear incoming sirens.

Location: Not yet specified but would be Dorset area

Casting Requirements: 

Therapist character - Adult 20+, no specified gender

Main Character (no given name yet) - Between the ages 18-20, no specified gender

Date and Time: Preferably a day to be chosen between the 6th April and the 19th April

Unpaid but I can pay for any travel costs if need, and would really appreciate any help on this important project!

Details of the location and character names will be built upon and confirmed later on

If interested feel free to respond to this post or email me at CaitlinFilmTv@outlook.com

items.text: Hello! Seeking an older Latina actress(NON UNION) to portray a Caribbean grandmother who is also a Santería priestess (Santera) for a play in Jersey City on 6/7/2026. This character is deeply rooted in spiritual tradition and community life: wise, grounded, and quietly authoritative. She carries generational knowledge, ritual presence, and emotional depth, serving as a moral and spiritual anchor within the story. REQUIREMENTS: Fluent Spanish speaker (all dialogue is in Spanish), Strong character and presence-driven performance, Ability to convey warmth, wisdom, and spiritual authority, Caribbean cultural background or lived familiarity preferred, Experience portraying elders, spiritual leaders, or grounded character role. RATE: 350 (est. 20 hours of work). PLEASE SEND MATERIALS TO INFO@GISELLE.US

sharedPost.text:
NOW CASTING FOR A NEWBORN TO 11-MONTH-OLD HISPANIC BABY FOR A HEALTHCARE COMMERCIAL!

Angela Boehm Casting is looking for a Hispanic baby for a Healthcare Commercial that will be filming in the NE Ohio area the week of April 13th, 2026.

If you have already auditioned, no need to resubmit. We already have your audition :) 

*Please see below for more details*

DETAILS:

Project: Healthcare Commercial 
Usage: Local/regional healthcare 
TV, Social and Web 
VIDEO Use ONLY - NO Digital Stills or Print use
Filming Location: NE Ohio Area
Shoot Dates: The week of April 13th

Pay Rate: USAGE Plus 1 Shoot Day (Up to 8 hrs Only) 
Child (12 + Under) $1250 + 20% A. Fee
1 year buyout and usage fee renewable

Submission & Selections: Video submission. A current photo and full body also needed. We do not need to see photos in advance, just include them with the video.

Submission Deadline: ASAP; Wednesday, April 1st 9:00am at the latest

Roles & Creative Specs:

Slate instructions: Name, Agent (or phone if you’re not with an agent), Age, and any conflicts with filming dates (note: it is ideal to have none :)). Please state if you are a real family auditioning (as well as state the family member’s names and the role they are auditioning for). No need to state your location, but please note this is a local hire to NE Ohio.

Audition Directions:

Please do not tape outside
Please have a blank background
Please put slates at the end of the audition.
Please keep all videos between 50-100mb!!!

Baby, newborn-11 months (Hispanic) A young mother, sits up in bed with her young baby. A 1-year-old. The baby cries. (Which we can do with sound effects from the reverse view without needing to have the actual baby crying). Her husband (any race) 28 sits next to them and tries to comfort her. Home environment description: A modest home. A starter home. Maybe even an apartment feel. This is a younger family who’s starting out. Please do one take and have the child do the action alone. For a second take you can be in the audition to help your child with the action if you’re willing to be in the commercial with her if chosen.

*When auditioning - less is MORE!

All submissions must be emailed to angela@angelaboehmcasting.com with subject line "Hispanic Baby" ASAP or by Wednesday, April 1st at 9:00AM. Please no YouTube links.  Send submissions via WeTransfer or Dropbox.   

Please share with anyone who may fit the specs, as this is a difficult find. Thank you in advance! 

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team

items.text:
FlightTime Productions proudly presents auditions for the upcoming Short Film:
Amelia, Once More

We are seeking cast members of all kinds: adult men, women and children. Must be 16+ to audition for the production. 

Non-Union Actors Only!

Auditions are by appointment only:

Friday, April 3rd, 2026

11AM, 12PM, 1PM, 2PM, 3PM & 4PM

To sign up for a free audition appointment, please email an updated copy of your headshot and acting resume to ameliastageplay@gmail.com. Please also list two available audition times you are available to audition at.

Auditions will be held at:

Seattle Public Library- Ballard Branch

5614 22nd Ave. N.W. 

Seattle, WA 98107

*This event is NOT hosted, sponsored, or endorsed by The Seattle Public Library*

For auditions, please prepare a 1-minute monologue of your choice. Preferably a comedic or dramatic monologue that can show your talent range. Please note, improvisation skills are definitely important for the production. You will also be acting out parts from the short film with other actors for the audition process.

If cast, there will be rehearsal schedule meeting to discuss availability as well as the show schedule. A stipend will be paid out to all actors involved in the film.

Filming will begin in July 2026 for a 3-6 week timeframe.

NCL Dancer Audition in LA
Dancer Auditions in LA on April 23rd for Norwegian Cruise Line

Open Call

Sign in at 9:30AM

Audition at 10:00AM

Please bring a hard copy of your resume and headshot. Be prepared to dance multiple styles. All dancers should bring flat dance shoes/jazz slip-ons as well as sneakers. Female identifying dancers should bring dance heels. 

The Six Compound4061 

Laurel Canyon Blvd. 

Studio City, CA 91604

Visit bit.ly/4bFrg1Y for more info!

Non-union. 18 and up only please.

items.text:
BOEING BOEING ACTOR CALL OUT!
Rowntree Players are delighted to announce that audition registration for Boeing Boeing is now open✈️

Don’t miss your chance to be part of this fast-paced, hilarious comedy — we’d love to see you there!

Register now and get ready for take-off… 👀✨

Click the link to read our audition pack and register - https://www.rowntreeplayers.co.uk/

🎭 Boeing Boeing

📅 23rd - 25th July 2026

📍 The Joseph Rowntree Theatre, York

Cleared for Takeoff: A High-Flying Farce!�This 1960s French farce adapted for the English-speaking stage features self-styled Parisian lothario Bernard, who has Italian, German and American fiancées, each a beautiful airline hostess with frequent “layovers.” He keeps “one up, one down, and one pending” – until unexpected schedule changes bring all three to Paris, and Bernard’s apartment, at the same time.

items.text:
Urgent Casting Call - Unpaid- Student Project
Chapman AP - Muddy D

Genre: Comedy/ drama/ Mocumentary. 

Shooting date: April 17th – 19th

Logline: A delusional aspiring artist documents his own rise to fame in a self-made documentary—only to discover that his growing audience is laughing at him, forcing him to question his identity and whether to keep creating. 

Derek / 20-40 /  An aspiring “creative” who believes he’s on the brink of recognition, performing under the persona “Muddy D” with unshakable confidence. Beneath the ego is a deeply vulnerable man forced to confront the gap between his self-image and reality—and decide whether to keep creating anyway.

Mom / 30-80 / Derek’s mother. Warm, practical, and grounded in reality, she genuinely cares about her son and has supported him throughout his life. She has witnessed his creativity since childhood and still holds onto that version of him, even if she no longer fully understands what he is trying to become.

Linda / 30-80 / A regular at the dive bar. Observant, blunt, and unintentionally harsh. She represents the outside world’s honest (and often dismissive) perception of Derek.

Credit, meal and copy and gas comp provide

Non-union

Photo and reels to submit 

DM or email to zmao@chapman.edu

🚨 LAST FEW SPOTS 🚨

Join us at the MAGNIFICENT FILMS Cannes Villa (12th–20th May) 🎬✨

Walk to the beach, the Croisette, and the Old Town and just 5 minutes by Uber to the Palais des Festivals. You couldn’t be better placed for Cannes.

Whether it’s your first time or you’re a regular, this is your chance to plug into a great network of filmmakers, host meetings, and be part of a relaxed but high-level villa environment during the festival.

Final availability:
• 1 twin room – £2,500
• A couple of single spots – £1,250

Includes all villa networking events + our exclusive MAGNIFICENT FILMS party 🎉

⏳ When they’re gone, they’re gone.

Come for the connections, stay for the sunshine, and make Cannes count 🌴☀️

email:harriet@magnificentfilms.co.uk if you want to join us x

items.text:
Amazing opportunity for UK women, hope it's ok to share here!

CASTING CALL: Garnier Hair Campaign ✨

Women with gorgeous hair needed! 

We’re looking to connect with UK based millenial women (aged 30–45) who are loyal Garnier Olia users (10+ years).

For this project, we’re specifically looking for someone with long, glossy hair (ideally dark/brunette) and a natural confidence on camera.

This shoot will take place in Prague (mid-April, dates TBC), 

Fee: £8000 + expenses, shoot fees and travel fees.

If this sounds like you — or you know someone who fits the bill — tag your friend with the beautiful hair below

 To apply, please send:

– Your name, age and location

– A recent photo

– A note on your experience using Garnier Olia

Email: casting@casperblackcasting.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'GARNIER OLIA HAIR CAMPAIGN CASTING NOW UK UK-based women aged 30-45 who are long-term Garnier Olia users (10+ years) Seeking long, glossy, healthy-looking hair (ideally dark/ dark/brunette) & natural confidence on camera Shoot in Prague (mid April, dates TBC) Paid opportunity + £8,000 buyout To apply send your name, age, location, a recent photo & short note on Olia use to casting@casperblackcasting.com'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM (*****Me & the Homies*****) – VANCOUVER**

Looking for an actor (Black or Latino, male-presenting, able to play 16–18) for a supporting role in an upcoming independent short film.

**About the Film:**
*Me & the Homies* is a grounded coming-of-age story based on a real night growing up in LA. It follows a group of teenage friends over one night that starts fun and slowly turns darker, exploring loyalty, pressure, and identity.

**Role: “Stats”**
Sharp, observant, and lowkey funny. Stats is always reading the room and calling things out with a dry edge. He feels like one of the guys, but he’s more calculated than he lets on. When things get serious, his instincts kick in, he knows when to push and when to fall back. Strong presence, natural delivery, and subtle performance are key.

**Details:**
* Shoot Dates: April 10, 11 (night shoots)
* Location: Vancouver
* Non-union / Indie / Unpaid (meals + footage provided)

If interested, please send:
* Headshot / recent photo
* Demo reel (if available)
* Age + contact info

Email: mysticstylezfilm@gmail.com

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – INDIE NO-BUDGET FILM** 🎬

Hi everyone! I’m looking to cast a **female actor** for a small but important role in an indie short film.

🎭 **Role:** Day Care Teacher
* Female
* Age: 30–40
* Warm, natural, and expressive presence

📍 **Location:** Surrey
📅 **Date:** 4th April
⏱️ **Duration:** Approx. 2 hours shoot

🎥 **Details:**
* Volunteer / non-paid position
* Light, manageable shoot with a small crew

✨ **What you’ll get:**
* IMDb credit
* Crafty (food & refreshments on set)
* Opportunity to be part of a passion-driven indie project

If you’re interested or know someone who fits the role, please send your **headshot and a link to any previous work** on **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**

Thank you! 🙏

message.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Elisabeth über Gespräche beim KBF.

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 167. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 07.04.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Marion Rossmann 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber 

Casting und Besetzung international – worauf kommt es wirklich an? 

Marion Rossmann ist eine erfahrene Casting Directorin mit über zwei Jahrzehnten Erfahrung in der Film- und Fernsehbranche. Sie hat an zahlreichen nationalen und internationalen Produktionen mitgewirkt. In ihrem Vortrag gibt sie Einblicke in den internationalen Casting-Prozess, berichtet über Unterschiede und Gemeinsamkeiten zwischen verschiedenen Ländern, erklärt die Anforderungen an Schauspieler*innen für internationale Produktionen und gibt praktische Tipps zur Vorbereitung auf (internationale) Castings. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die in der Film- und Fernsehbranche tätig sind oder sich für internationale Besetzungsprozesse und Karrieremöglichkeiten interessieren. 

© Ch. Pilsl

items.text:
**KRAKÓW**

6-7 dni zdjęciowych

Do filmu dyplomowego studenta Szkoły Filmowej, poświęconego Nowej Hucie i realizowanego w Krakowie w czerwcu 2026, szukamy doświadczonych:

**DOP **

**DŹWIĘKOWCA (Boom operator) **

**SCENOGRAFA**

**MONTAŻYSTĘ obecnego na planie**

Projekt NON-PROFIT, jesteśmy otwarci na ewentualne zaproponowanie wynagrodzenia symbolicznego

Film ma zapewniony budżet, jest w trakcie pozyskania dodatkowego dofinansowania.

**Czarna komedia w estetyce PRL+Cyberpunk**

Z potencjałem festiwalowym.

Zapewniamy dobre warunki i miłą atmosferę pracy na planie, zwrot kosztów dojazdu

Prośba o zgłoszenia w komentarzu pod postem ORAZ mailowo *annahnazaruk@gmail.com*

items.text:
Poszukiwany Epizodysta do na sygnale 
👨‍⚕️ Rola Mężczyzna okolo 35 - 42 lat  będzie grał ojca będzie nieprzytomny, reagujacy 
📅 Zdjęcia: 7 kwietnia 
📍 Miejsce Zbiórki : Warszawa – Falenica 
💰 Stawka: 250 płatne przelewem według umowy 
📌 Wymagania:
pełna dyspozycyjność w podanym dniu (trzy sceny nie znamy godzin) 
najlepiej mężczyzna z Warszawy lub okolic (brak zwrotu kosztów dojazdu)
Tylko mężczyźni bez obcego akcentu
Mężczyźni które ostatnio nie grali w tym serialu od około 3 miesiący epizodów 
📧 Zgłoszenia wysyłamy do wtoreku godz. 17.00 na adres: 📨 statysci.nasygnale@gmail.com  
W tytule maila: NA SYGNALE –  7.04 - mężczyzna ojciec 
W treści podaj:
imię i nazwisko
wiek, WZROST
Miejsce zamieszkania tylko miejscowość 
telefon kontaktowy
dołącz aktualne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki 
📱 Wybrany kandydat zostanie powiadomiony  SMS-em. 
Tylko kompletne zgłoszenia będą brane pod uwagę

items.title: 🎬🎬Do produkcji telewizyjnej poszukujemy statystek!🎬🎬

items.text:
🎬 Szukam aktorów, epizodystów i statystów!
Prowadzę profesjonalne studio nagrań na krakowskich Bielanach. Szukam aktorów, epizodystów i statystów, którzy chcą pokazać światu (i reżyserom castingowym!), że potrafią też śpiewać, ale nie mają na to budżetu lub odpowiedniego sprzętu.

Proponuję prostą współpracę barterową: Wy dostajecie unikalny, świetnie brzmiący utwór do swojej wizytówki (ok. 1,5 do 2 minut), a ja ciekawy projekt do mojego portfolio. W zamian proszę jedynie o oznaczenie mojego studia przy publikacji materiału. 🤝

**Dlaczego warto?**

Agencje i reżyserzy kochają wszechstronnych twórców. Autorska piosenka lub świetnie nagrany monolog wokalny to ogromny atut na castingach!

**"Ale ja nie mam mikrofonu i nie trafiam idealnie w dźwięki..."**

Dla mnie liczą się Twoje emocje i gra aktorska, a nie sprzęt! Wystarczy Ci zwykły telefon i słuchawki. Nie przejmuj się potknięciami – posiadam potężny system edycji **Melodyne 5 Studio** (oprogramowanie za 3000 zł!), który wyrówna Twój głos, poprawi intonację i sprawi, że zabrzmisz perfekcyjnie. Z nagrania na dyktafon wyciągnę kinową/radiową jakość! 🎚️✨

**Wymagania z Twojej strony:**

✅ Posiadanie aktywnego profilu (Instagram/Facebook/TikTok) z minimum **1000 obserwujących**, na którym docelowo opublikujesz nagranie.

**Jak to działa? (Całość możemy zrobić w 100% online!):**
1. 📩 **Napisz do mnie:** Daj znać, jaki klimat muzyczny Cię interesuje (np. musical, mroczny pop, piosenka aktorska).
2. 🎧 **Podeślij referencje:** Wklej linki do muzyki, która oddaje emocje, jakie chcesz zagrać.
3. ✍️ **Podaj temat:** Opisz mi w kilku zdaniach, o czym chcesz opowiedzieć/zaśpiewać.
4. 🎹 **Odbierz podkład:** Przygotowuję bit i wysyłam go do Ciebie.
5. 🎤 **Nagraj się w domu:** Wczuwasz się w rolę, zakładasz słuchawki, odpalasz dyktafon w telefonie i nagrywasz wokal!
6. 🎛️ **Ja robię resztę:** Tworzę z tego profesjonalnie brzmiące demo.

🎁 **BONUS DLA AKTORÓW Z KRAKOWA!** 🎥

Jesteś z Krakowa lub okolic i wolisz działać na żywo? Dla wybranych osób o najciekawszych pomysłach oferuję nagranie profesjonalnej wokalnej wizytówki / self-tape'a u mnie w studiu na greenscreenie. Zapewniam zawodowy sprzęt wideo, oświetlenie i pełny montaż gotowego klipu. Idealne do wysłania reżyserowi castingu!

Liczba miejsc na darmową współpracę barterową jest ograniczona. Chcesz pokazać swój wokalny talent i zdobyć świetny materiał do portfolio? Pisz w wiadomości prywatnej! 🎭
items.summary:
🎬 Szukam aktorów, epizodystów i statystów!
Prowadzę profesjonalne studio nagrań na krakowskich Bielanach. Szukam aktorów, epizodystów i statystów, którzy chcą pokazać światu (i reżyserom castingowym!), że potrafią też śpiewać, ale nie mają na to budżetu lub odpowiedniego sprzętu.

Proponuję prostą współpracę barterową: Wy dostajecie unikalny, świetnie brzmiący utwór do swojej wizytówki (ok. 1,5 do 2 minut), a ja ciekawy projekt do mojego portfolio. W zamian proszę jedynie o oznaczenie mojego studia przy publikacji materiału. 🤝

**Dlaczego warto?**

Agencje i reżyserzy kochają wszechstronnych twórców. Autorska piosenka lub świetnie nagrany monolog wokalny to ogromny atut na castingach!

**"Ale ja nie mam mikrofonu i nie trafiam idealnie w dźwięki..."**

Dla mnie liczą się Twoje emocje i gra aktorska, a nie sprzęt! Wystarczy Ci zwykły telefon i słuchawki. items.title: 🎬 Szukam aktorów, epizodystów i statystów!

items.text:
🎬 OD ZERA DO PLANU FILMOWEGO
Praktyczny przewodnik epizodysty

Chcesz spróbować swoich sił na planie filmowym, ale nie wiesz od czego zacząć?
A może byłeś już na planie i czujesz, że działasz trochę po omacku?

👉 Ten poradnik powstał, żebyś nie musiał uczyć się wszystkiego metodą prób i błędów.

💡 To wiedza od praktyka – nie teoria

Nazywam się Bartłomiej Skowron.
Zaczynałem od zera – bez znajomości, bez szkoły aktorskiej.

Wcześniej przez lata byłem w wojsku.
Dopiero później podjąłem decyzję, żeby zmienić życie i spróbować swoich sił na planie filmowym.

Dziś mam na koncie:
✔ ponad 100 projektów
✔ epizody w serialach i filmach (w tym produkcje Netflix)
✔ współpracę z rozpoznawalnymi aktorami
✔ doświadczenie, które zebrałem „od środka”

Sprawdź moje doświadczenie:
https://filmpolski.pl/fp/index.php?osoba=11200011

https://www.filmweb.pl/person/Bart%C5%82omiej+Skowron-2973719

https://www.imdb.com/name/nm13121784/?ref_=fn_t_1

Mój profil aktorski na Instagramie:
https://www.instagram.com/barlomiej_skowron_official

👉 Ten poradnik to dokładnie to, czego sam potrzebowałem na starcie.

📘 Co znajdziesz w środku?

✔ Wstęp – jak wygląda prawdziwy początek
✔ Czym jest praca epizodysty w praktyce
✔ Moja historia – od wojska do planu
✔ Czy to jest dla Ciebie? (bez ściemy)
✔ Jak zacząć – pierwsze realne kroki
✔ Casting – jak to wygląda naprawdę
✔ Pierwszy dzień na planie – instrukcja przetrwania
✔ Zasady niepisane na planie
✔ Pieniądze, umowy i realia finansowe
✔ Co dalej – rozwój i możliwości
✔ Najczęstsze pytania i sytuacje kryzysowe

📖 Ponad 100 stron konkretnej wiedzy

Bez lania wody.
Bez motywacyjnych bajek.
Tylko realia tej branży.

🎥 Dlaczego warto?

✔ możesz zacząć nawet bez doświadczenia
✔ to realna opcja, żeby dorobić do budżetu
✔ poznasz ludzi z branży i znane twarze
✔ zbudujesz kontakty, które otwierają drzwi
✔ zobaczysz, jak naprawdę wygląda plan filmowy od środka

Dla jednych to przygoda.
Dla innych dodatkowy zarobek.
Dla niektórych – początek nowej drogi.

⚠️ To nie jest poradnik o „łatwej sławie”

To szczery przewodnik dla osób, które chcą wejść w ten świat świadomie i bez rozczarowań.

❤️ Kupując – pomagasz

Część dochodu ze sprzedaży zostanie przekazana na schronisko dla zwierząt 🐾

🔥 PROMOCJA: -20% tylko przez najbliższy tydzień

To najlepszy moment, żeby zacząć – taniej i z konkretną wiedzą w ręku.

🔥 Jeśli ja mogłem zacząć od zera – Ty też możesz.

⬇️Link do bezpośredniego zakupu 📲
https://www.naffy.io/bartlomiej-skowron/od-zera-do-planu-filmowego-praktyczny-przewodnik-epizodysty-oE1

items.text:
Casting Call! Paid, 1/2 Day Shoot.
Hello! We are working with a non-profit on a short film about racial inequity. The film calls for 4-6 actors/actresses of Native American descent.

These roles are background extra positions to play the lead actor's family.

$50 day rate for the 3 hour shoot in Denver. We are eyeing to film early to mid-April!

Please send an email to kodocasting@gmail.com with your headshot and any applicable materials! Thank you!

items.text:
Hello! I’m looking for an actor for my Prod 1 short and need a trans masculine actor (early into medical transition) to play the part of a closeted trans boy being accidentally outed to his mom, by his school counselor. 

The character, Luke, is suppose to be around 15/16, but I’m looking for someone 18-23 to play the part. Shooting days will be April 11th and 12th, unpaid but food is provided, as well as a copy of the finished short once it’s done. 

You’re welcome to comment, private message me on here, or email me, if you’re interested or have questions. 
dominic.dhorton99@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Student play, performing at The Source Theatre in Stratford, London in July. Rehearsals will be from mid May until the end of June.

This is a black satirical comedy drama about a British Jew who unexpectedly travels to the West Bank of Palestine. It is a sensitive subject matter so please take that into consideration if applying.

Casting for the following:

- White British Jewish male (mid 20s-early 30s) for Leon (lead)

- Arabic Muslim female (mid 20s - early 30s), preferably hijabi

- Arabic Muslim male (late 20s - early 30s)

- Jewish athletic-built male (any age)

- Arabic Muslim young boy (9-14)

If interested to learn more about the please contact u3008723@uel.ac.uk.

This is unpaid but will cover expenses.

items.text:
**School of Uke is hiring — **If you're an actor, performer, musician or creative looking for fun paid work, we’d love to hear from you. Please send cv and cover email to [info@schoolofuke.co.uk](mailto:info@schoolofuke.co.uk)

**Are you…**

 🌟 Outgoing and charismatic?

 🎭 An Actor, Singer or Performer?

 🎶 Passionate about music?

 🎸 A Ukulele/Guitar Player or Singer?

**School of Uke is a full-volume entertainment experience** that transforms how people connect with music. 

We’re on the lookout for **charismatic actors, singers, performers, and musicians** to join our teaching team of Lead and Assistant Tutors in London, Bristol and Brighton. If you play the **ukulele or guitar, and/or sing** and love entertaining a crowd, this could be for you.

**School of Uke is all about exploring music together** — unlocking confidence, connection, and creativity through the songs you love.

So if you’re a performer or singer** **and can entertain a room full of people **we want to hear from you!**

You’re also invited to come meet us at our **Easter Party and 51st Showcase** on Wed 1st April and see what we’re all about. **DM for guest-list **✨👠🎶

▶️ **What we do:**[ ](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/IXuRtB4Deno)[https://youtube.com/shorts/IXuRtB4Deno](https://youtube.com/shorts/IXuRtB4Deno)

sharedPost.text:
Closeness and boundaries are not just mental decisions; they are also experienced physically.
​
In 𝗯𝗼𝗱𝘆 𝗽𝘀𝘆𝗰𝗵𝗼𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗽𝘆, we use body awareness to help restore these capacities and recognise and change automatic relationship patterns.
​
Healthy relationships begin with reconnecting to your own bodily awareness.
​
In Berlin & Online.
​
→ 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲:
https://www.bodymindtherapy.de/en/erstgespraech-stress-emotional-release
.
.
.
#berlintherapy #psychotherapyberlin #somatictherapy #bodypsychotherapy #traumainformedtherapy #mentalhealthberlin #stressreliefberlin #selfregulation #mindbodyconnection #therapyforprofessionals

items.text:
Twelve Casting Call
After a fatal car crash, Michael is given twelve seconds between life and death to relive the defining moments of his past—confronting love, loss, and regret—as he searches for a way to say goodbye to the person who matters most: his daughter, Lucy.

Michael

Male: 30’s 

Ethnicity: Any

Michael on his 30’s

 defined by the heavy intersection 

of grief and redemption. He is physically and

emotionally "soaked"—tense, weary, and 

gripped by the stress of a

life spent trying to outrun his past. 

Michael is a protector who 

"had to grow up fast," and

while he dies with regrets, 

his final moments are defined by a

selfless need to ensure his daughter, 

Lucy, knows she is loved.

Male: 30’s 

Ethnicity: Any

———————————————————————

The Guide

The Guide serves as the ethereal bridge 

between life and death. 

She is young (20’s) 

with golden-strawberry hair, 

possessing a "gentle, steady gaze" 

that suggests ancient

 wisdom despite her youthful appearance.

Her attire—a dark cloak over white robes—

visually represents the transition from the darkness 

of the void to the light of the afterlife. 

She is not a judge, but a witness; she watches

Michael’s memories with "grace" and "calm," 

Female: 20’s 

Ethnicity: Any

———————————————————————

Format: Short

Date: T.B.A

Status : Non-Union/Union

Location: MA/ RI

Compensation: Paid

Resumes - Headshots - Reels to :

Info@vipexproductions.com

items.text:
**🎬 Szukam aktorów do nagrań.**

Szukam osób do współpracy przy nagraniach w stylu UGC – nagrania telefonem, w warunkach domowych.

📍 Wymagania:
• wiek: 20–35 lat
• bardzo dobra znajomość języka angielskiego (nagrania w języku angielskim)
• swoboda przed kamerą

💰 Współpraca płatna

🎯 Tematyka: promocja produktu z branży health & wellness

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej + krótkie info o sobie lub portfolio (jeśli jest).

items.text:
**We are still looking for two performers. Required at two locations: Lynn Valley (North Vancouver) and Tsawwassen.**

**Job Overview**

Two days @ Tsawwassen: April 3rd and April 4th 12:30pm - 5:30pm

One day @ North Van: April 4th 11:30am - 4pm

Pay $30 - 35 per hour (depending on experience)

Join our vibrant team as a Mascot Performer / Actor, where you will bring joy, excitement, and memorable experiences to audiences of all ages! In this lively role, you will embody the beloved Easter Bunny for photo shoots, engage with guests through energetic performances, and create magical moments that leave lasting impressions.

Easter Bunny Costume provided.

Your enthusiasm and creativity will help foster a fun and welcoming environment, making the attraction unforgettable. This paid position offers an exciting opportunity to showcase your acting talents while spreading happiness in a dynamic setting.

**Responsibilities**
* Perform as designated Easter Bunny mascot with lively energy, ensuring authentic and engaging portrayals
* Interact with guests, especially children, through playful gestures, poses, and storytelling to enhance their experience and to capture a precious memory picture
* Participate in costume fitting and tuition to perfect character and movements
* Maintain character integrity throughout performances while adhering to safety guidelines

This role is perfect for energetic performers who love entertaining others and thrive in lively environments. We value creativity, enthusiasm, and a passion for making people smile!

PM me and please forward relevant experience and recent photo.

topComments.text:
Do the mascots have someone with them? 

Do they get breaks? Or do you expect them to be in the suit for 4.5 hrs straight?

items.title: **We are still looking for two performers. Required at two locations: Lynn Valley (North Vancouver) and Tsawwassen.**

items.text:
CASTING CALL
THE COLOR I NEVER WORE-

SYNOPSIS

This independent drama explores the nuanced experiences and stories of minorities. 

We aim to capture authentic emotions and tell a story that resonates with the diverse community in Vancouver.

SEEKING THE FOLLOWING ROLES

1. (Female, 60s+):

Ethnicity: East Asian

Description: A character with deep life experience. 

Must be able to convey subtle emotions through facial expressions and presence.

2. (Male, 60s+):

Ethnicity: East Asian

Description: A character who carries the weight of their history. 

Seeking an actor who can express strength and vulnerability through quiet moments.

COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

Credit: Screen credit provided (IMDb eligible).

Meals: Full catering provided on set (Lunch & Dinner).

Portfolio: High-quality footage for your acting reel and portfolio.

PayRoll : $200 per day (Flat Fee)

SUBMISSION PROCESS

Phase 1 (Self-Tape): Please submit a 1-2 Minute Self-Tape Video focusing on facial acting and expressions (Close-up).

Phase 2 (Interview): Successful applicants will be invited for a person-to-person interview and an on-site acting audition.

DEADLINE: March 31, 2026

HOW TO APPLY: atharv.maakaamal@gmail.com

Please include your headshot, resume, and the self-tape video.

topComments.text:
Hi… I’m so interested! I played the White Rabbit 3 years ago in a Panto at Mary Winspear called Alice in Pantoland. I’m an Actor and an Early Childhood Educator and Infant Toddler Educator and can really be the Easter Bunny or the White Rabbit… can relate to children big time. 
My agent is Coultish Talent Agency but can deal directly with you. :)
I’ve been the Easter bunny before and it’s the absolute greatest joy! Right up there with being one of Santa’s elves! ￼ Anyone who gets this position can expect to have a whole lot of fun 🤗🫶🩷🐰🐣

items.text:
🚨 AKUT CASTING – vi mangler skuespillere til i morgen! 🚨 Hej alle!
Vi er en gruppe gymnasieelever i 3.G, der er i gang med vores elevproduktion, og desværre er nogle af vores skuespillere sprunget fra i sidste øjeblik – så vi mangler AKUT folk!

🎭 Vi søger 3 roller:

 • Christian – hovedrollens kæreste

 • Rank – Christians ven

 • Vega – hovedrollens veninde

👥 Derudover søger vi også statister!

🎉 Scene: Det er en festscene, så du skal møde op i festtøj. Viben er lidt “Nordsjælland”-miljø.

📍 Location: Hvidovre

📅 Optagedage:

 • 27. marts (i morgen!) kl. 19:00–23:00

 • 2., 3. og 4. april (ikke sikkert alle dage bruges, men sæt gerne tid af)

💸 OBS: Det er en low budget elevproduktion, så der er desværre ikke løn – men til gengæld får du erfaring, optagelser til showreel og en fed oplevelse!

Hvis du har lyst til at være med (eller kender nogen der har!), så skriv hurtigst muligt 🙏

Vi håber virkelig, nogen kan hjælpe med kort varsel – det ville betyde mega meget for os! ❤️

Vi håber virkelig, nogen kan hjælpe med kort varsel – det ville betyde mega meget for os! ❤️

items.text:
SUBMISSIONS CLOSED. Thank you to all who submitted!

INDEPENDENT FEATURE FILM CASTING CALL:

Genre: Existential horror

Title: Beyond Now 

Logline: A group of close-knit friends get together for one last hurrah. What awaits them are horrors that will change their lives in ways they could never prepare for.

Production company: Bench-Top Productions 

Contact info: beyondnowproduction@protonmail.com

IMPORTANT NOTE: These roles have hard shoot dates over April, May, and October. If submitting please confirm full availability for the dates listed for each specific role. The audition deadline is 10:00 PM FRIDAY 3/27 and this casting call will close on that deadline. 

ROLES:

Hailey, Lead female: Early to Mid 30’s

Mom of the group. Overly Responsible. Protective of her friends and family. Cautious about her partner Ethan’s Anxiety. Hailey organized this trip as a final ‘hurrah’ to announce her pregnancy.

Shoot dates: 4/9, 4/10, 4/13, 4/14, 4/17, 4/18, 4/19, 4/20, 4/21, 5/9, 5/10, 5/11, 5/12, 5/16, 10/16, 10/17, 10/18 

Brooke, Supporting female: Late 20’s - Early 30’s 

Wannabe Instagram influencer. Super jealous of her friend Megan and her “so-called career.” One of the class clowns of the group. She has a ‘Team Rocket Jesse and James’ dynamic with her best friend Chris from their years working together in a coffee shop. Strongly copes with humor. Hyperfixates on her special interests: photography, true crime and mystics.

Shoot dates: 4/10, 4/13, 4/14, 4/18, 4/19, 4/20, 5/7, 5/10, 10/16, 10/17, 10/18 

Compensation: IMDB credit, meal and reel. 

Union status: Non-union

Shoot locations: Conifer, Golden and Denver CO

AUDITION INFORMATION: Auditions will be held via selftape. To receive sides and selftape instructions, please send a headshot, resume and reel to beyondnowproduction@protonmail.com with which role you're submitting for and a confirmation of availability for the dates listed for that role. The deadline is 10:00 PM FRIDAY 3/27 and this casting call will close on that deadline. 

IMDB: [[https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2)](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2)

Dato: Tirsdag. april Lokation: Kebenhavn Tidsrum: 11.15-13.45 Som tak for din medvirken vil du modtage en biografbillet, og vi vil selvfolgelig gore vores bedste for at skabe en god og spzendende oplevelse! Vil du vaere med? Send en mail til statist@hyaenefilm.dk, statist@hya og vedhaeft et vellignende foto + fulde navn, alder, telefonnummer og e-mail. Du bedes skrive folgende i emnefeltet: "METRO" Vi glaeder OS meget til at hore fra dig!'

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Hi everyone! 

We're casting for the short film 'The Way of the Lamb', shooting end of April/Early May around Copenhagen.It’s a period piece set in 1920s Denmark. 

The film follows a boy’s spiritual discovery and explores life after death.

You can read more about the project here: https://filmdaily.co/indie-film/film-festivals/way-of-the-lamb-daniel-knights-spiritual-coming-of-age-wins-first-franzi-shorts-competition/

**We're looking for 5 roles:**

-8-10 year-old boy (Protagonist) 

-10-13 year-old female (Sister) 

-35-50 year-old male (Dad) 

-+50 year-old female (Grandma) 

+50 year-old male (Priest) 

The film will be spoken in Danish, so no English fluency is required, but advised, as we're working with an international crew. 

We will be holding auditions for these roles, so please email us on **wayofthelamb@franzifilms.com** if you're interested or know someone who might be :)

Unfortunately, as it's a short film (and it's very tough to get a budget for these projects), nobody is getting a salary. We're looking for someone who's mostly looking to have fun and go on this ride with us for the love of it, get good material for their reel, and go to festivals. 

I'm directing, Zoe Stiletano is producing, Daniel Knight is the writer, and Nick Gray is the DP. It's produced by www.franzifilms.com 

Looking forward to getting you on the team! 🙌

items.text:
Poszukiwany Epizodysta do na sygnale 
👨‍⚕️ Rola Mężczyzna okolo 35 - 42 lat  będzie grał ojca będzie nieprzytomny, reagujacy 
📅 Zdjęcia: 7 kwietnia 
📍 Miejsce Zbiórki : Warszawa – Falenica 
💰 Stawka: 250 płatne przelewem według umowy 
📌 Wymagania:
pełna dyspozycyjność w podanym dniu (trzy sceny nie znamy godzin) 
najlepiej mężczyzna z Warszawy lub okolic (brak zwrotu kosztów dojazdu)
Tylko mężczyźni bez obcego akcentu
Mężczyźni które ostatnio nie grali w tym serialu od około 3 miesiący epizodów 
📧 Zgłoszenia wysyłamy do środy godz. 17.00 na adres: 📨 statysci.nasygnale@gmail.com  
W tytule maila: NA SYGNALE –  7.04 - mężczyzna ojciec 
W treści podaj:
imię i nazwisko
wiek, WZROST
Miejsce zamieszkania tylko miejscowość 
telefon kontaktowy
dołącz aktualne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki 
📱 Wybrany kandydat zostanie powiadomiony  SMS-em. 
Tylko kompletne zgłoszenia będą brane pod uwagę

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
Urgent Casting Call
Non-union

Short Film/Proof Of Concept 

Please send an email to Red.film.2026@gmail.com with the subject line "Casting Submission - Reid" by April 3rd. 

We will be hosting Zoom Auditions on April 4th all day, and April 5th after 2pm PST 

Please include Headshot, Resume, and Reel (If Available)

Director: Zev Lemke 

Writer: Zev Lemke 

Producer: Samantha Teasdale 

Casting Director: Jacob Ellis 

Shoot Dates: EARLY APRIL(9th-14th)Rate of Pay: Volunteer, Reel Footage, and end credits

Location: Vancouver/British Columbia 

Logline: In this modern retelling of Little Red Riding Hood, an underage Reid ventures into a nightclub for the first time. When he locks eyes with a seductively sly older man, he finally feels wanted. But under the street lights, the man’s insatiable charisma now seems ravenous, and the boy must confront a terrifying truth: some people are truly wolves in sheep's clothing.

Content warning - This proof of concept discusses themes of sexual assault and the repercussions of it. This shoot does not include any nudity or depictions of the assault. However, the full film will include nudity and depictions of sexual assault. Actors in this shoot may be considered for the full film. 

CHARACTERS:

Reid (Lead, 18-22) – 18 years old, average height, slim build. Reid is in the midst of queer adolescent self-discovery. There's a cautious optimism to him, and he sees the world full of possibility, even if he's not sure where he belongs in it yet. In the aftermath of a sexual assault, he struggles to fully process his experience and broken worldview. To persevere, he must suppress his emotions, and only once he gets ‘out of the woods’ does the impact of the night begin to hit him.

items.text:
**JELENIA GÓRA i okolice**

**Plan zdjęciowy w JESTED,** **CZECHY**

**Zapewniamy transport z Jeleniej Góry.**

**14-15 kwietnia**

Do biograficznego filmu fabularnego osadzonego w latach 70tych, szukam Statystów jako:

 **- TECHNICY / WOJSKOWI  - wiek ok. 20-50 lat – na 14 i 15 kwietnia** (może być 1 dzień lub 2)

**- BARMAN **– góralska knajpa, **ok. 30-50 lat**, na **15 kwietnia**

**- KELNERKA **– góralska knajpa, **dziewczyna ok. 20-35 lat – na 15 kwietnia**

Przed zdjęciami, prawdopodobnie 13 kwietnia – strzyżenie panów jeśli będzie taka potrzeba. 

**Stawka: 140 zł za dzień zdjęciowy + jednorazowo 50 zł dodatkowo za charakteryzację czyli strzyżenie (dotyczy tylko panów)**

**Wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

**MĘŻCZYŹNI: **

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką, wygolone boki i kark, wycięte wzorki na włosach oraz nienaturalne kolory oraz farbowane np. na czarny.

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko. Tutaj wyjątkiem na pewno może być Barman :)

**KOBIETY:**

- WŁOSY – preferowana długość do ramion lub dłuższe ,mogą być farbowane na jeden kolor, mogą być z odrostami. Wykluczone są pasemka, balejage, ombre, sombre itp.

- PAZNOKCIE - preferowane naturalne krótkie lub opiłowane w kształt migdała, mogą być pomalowane na czerwono lub zbliżone kolorem oraz naturalne. Nieakceptowane są długie paznokcie 

opiłowane w szpic lub kwadrat, zdobione, kolorowe lub french.

- TWARZ - najlepiej naturalna, bez widocznych zabiegów medycyny estetycznej, bez sztucznych, doczepianych rzęs, bez permanentnego makijażu

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **JCZ 14/15**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: **ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu (panowie) + aktualne ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI**

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

Osób dyspozycyjnych, pozytywnych i punktualnych w wieku 20-60 lat

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o:
* imię I nazwisko

• numer telefonu
• wizytówkę / link  YouTube

items.text:
🎬 Casting-Aufruf für Kurzfilm – Kinder (10–12 Jahre) 🎬

Für die Produktion eines emotionalen Kurzfilms suche ich Kinder im Alter von ca. 10–12 Jahren, die eine Schulklasse darstellen.

Gesucht werden:

•⁠  ⁠ca. 5–6 Kinder für Haupt-/Nebenrollen (mit mehr Screentime)

•⁠  ⁠weitere Kinder als Komparsen für Klassenszenen

Wichtig für die Besetzung:

Für die Hauptrollen wird ein heller, eher europäischer Typ bevorzugt (z. B. blonde oder hellhaarige Kinder), da dies zum visuellen Konzept des Films passt.  

Mädchen und Jungen sind gleichermaßen willkommen.

Drehdetails:

📍 Raum NRW (Recklinghausen)  

📅 Drehzeitraum: April

🎥 Erfahrung ist kein Muss – Natürlichkeit und Ausstrahlung stehen im Vordergrund  

Vergütung:

Aufwandsentschädigung + Verpflegung am Set

Bewerbung:

Bitte per PN:

•⁠  ⁠Name & Alter des Kindes  

•⁠  ⁠2–3 aktuelle Fotos  

•⁠  ⁠Wohnort  

•⁠  ⁠(optional) kurze Vorstellung / Erfahrung  

Ich freue mich auf eure Nachrichten! 🙌  

Gerne teilen!

items.text:
Har du god energi på kamera og elsker shopping, hverdagsinspiration og formidling? 📸 Så er det måske dig, vi leder efter som vært til City 2’s sociale medier.

Vi søger 1 vært, der har lyst til at være ansigtet udadtil på City 2’s kanaler og formidle content på en naturlig og imødekommende måde. Vi står for optagelse, redigering og alt det praktiske – du skal blot være ansigtet udadtil og får et færdigt script med det, der skal siges.

Om rollen:
• Medvirken i månedligt content til TikTok, Instagram og Facebook.
• Frekvens: Optages én gang om måneden.
• Optagelser foregår i City 2 Shoppingcenter.
• Tidsrum: kl. 13–16.
• Content bruges både organisk og til paid annoncering. Organisk annoncering er gratis opslag, der vises naturligt til følgere og andre brugere. Paid annoncering er opslag, man betaler for, så de vises til flere og udvalgte målgrupper.
• Script sendes på forhånd, så der er god tid til forberedelse.

Vi leder efter dig, der:
• Har god energi og er naturlig på kamera.
• Har en imødekommende og troværdig udstråling.
• Er tryg ved at tale til kamera og skabe nærvær.
• Er fleksibel og kan indgå i en løbende content-plan.
• Har erfaring fra lignende opgaver (bare en bonus)

Praktisk info.:
• Løn på dagsbasis

Sådan søger du:
• Send mig en kort video (30–60 sek.), hvor du formidler et valgfrit budskab til kamera – fx om noget, du holder af, dig selv eller en hverdagsoplevelse. MAIL: Simone@beyond11.dk.

👉 Går du med en vært gemt i maven 
– eller kender du én, der kunne være et godt match? Så hører vi meget gerne fra dig.

🌿✨ **STATISTER SØGES – MØDRE MED BARN** ✨🌿

Vil du og dit barn være med i en hyggelig optagelse i smukke, naturlige omgivelser? 🎬💚

Vi søger **mødre med barn** til at agere statister i en havescene. Det bliver en rolig og hyggelig dag med fokus på nærvær og naturlige øjeblikke 🌸

👩‍👧 **Hvem søger vi?**

* Mødre med barn/børn på maks 10 år.

* Jer der har lyst til at være foran kamera i uformelle rammer

* Ingen erfaring nødvendig

📍 Juulsøgaarden: Lavenvej 22, 8600 Skanderborg.

⏰ lørdag og søndag (4 og 5 april)

💰 Jobbet er ulønnet - I vil dog være garanteret en sjov og hyggelig dag, samt jeres navn på rollelisten🙌

Lyder det som noget for jer? 💫

Eller vil du bare høre lidt mere?…

..Send en mail til darchyproductions@gmail.com eller send en direkte besked til mig – vi glæder os til at høre fra jer!

Del meget gerne opslaget 🙏

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – LONDON (PAID)

Looking for a confident, outgoing person to be the face of a street-style interview series for TikTok.

You’ll be:
• Approaching people
• Asking fun / engaging questions
• Comfortable on camera

This is NOT traditional acting — more presenter / personality.

Details:
• 2–3 hour shoot
• £80–£100 paid
• London location

Ideal for:
• Drama students
• Aspiring presenters
• Content creators

Must have:
• Strong energy
• Natural speaking style
• Not afraid to talk to strangers

To apply:
Send a short video (30–60 secs) introducing yourself as if you're interviewing someone.

Potential for ongoing work if it’s a good fit.

items.text:
Hiring On-Site Live Selling Hosts / Product Presenters
Location: South El Monte, CA

We are looking for live selling hosts / product presenters to join our team on site in South El Monte.

Requirements:

No age limit

No gender restriction

Strong spoken English

Good presentation skills and strong on-camera or off-camera expression

Face showing or non-face showing formats are both acceptable

Must be able to work on site in South El Monte

Project Dates & Location:

Flexible schedule

Must be available at least 4–5 days per week

On-site in South El Monte, CA

Compensation:

Starting from $20/hour

Higher sales = higher earnings

Commission negotiable

Estimated earnings around $100/hour, with base pay plus commission

Role Responsibilities:

This role involves hosting live selling sessions on site, presenting products in clear and engaging English, interacting with viewers, answering questions, demonstrating product features, and helping drive sales through strong communication and presentation skills.

If interested, please send your basic information, relevant experience, and any past live selling or hosting clips if available.

items.text:
🎬 **Looking for an Experienced 1st Assistant Director (1st AD)**

Hi everyone,

We are currently looking for an experienced **1st AD** to join our short film production shooting on **April 18–19 in Toronto**.

This is a **low-budget independent project**, so we are ideally looking for someone who understands indie filmmaking and is willing to collaborate within a limited budget.

**Requirements:**
* Prior experience as a **1st AD on narrative projects**
* Must have worked on **film festival projects and/or feature films**
* Strong on-set organization and communication skills
* Able to manage schedule, crew coordination, and maintain efficient workflow

We are specifically looking for someone with **professional experience beyond student productions**.

This project is aimed at **international film festivals**, so we’re building a committed and passionate team.

If you’re interested, please DM me or email:
📩 zoeyfilm77@gmail.com

Feel free to share your **resume / IMDb / previous work**.

Thank you for your support!

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms and entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere & Virdee. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. 

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT
The story centres young people from South Asian backgrounds living in the UK, and international students navigating life in Britain/Europe. 

This is a multi-layered narrative covering: 

- Identity & belonging
- Family dynamics & generational conflict
- Love, relationships & marriage
- Crime & survival in urban environments
- Cultural expectations & taboo subjects
- Personal ambition and redefining success 

Each character will have a deep backstory, with storylines unfolding across drama, suspense, humour, and realism.
The project has already been seen successfully as a Theatre Stage Play production tester and is currently being developed for an on-screen series, with potential partnerships across major streaming platforms such as Netflix UK, BBC Films, BFI Film Council, Channel 4, ITV X Studios, Film Four, HBO Max, Hulu, Mubi, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Facebook Watch, Sky Studios, Plex, Paramount Pictures Plus, Pluto TV, Now TV, Channel Five, Peacock, Eros Now and B4U Motion Pictures Studios. 

🎬 WHO WE ARE CASTING 

We are seeking British South Asian (Desi) Talents: 

Must be UK born or raised within the UK with Strong understanding of British South Asian culture, including Social issues & taboo topics, music, arts, entertainment and Community dynamics with lived experiences. 

Age Range: 

Open to all age groups
Experienced and None-Experienced 

All Genders Can Apply

📍 LOCATION 

Auditions, rehearsals, and filming will take place in London. Rehearsals held at a North London studio base. Some filming may occur in other UK locations depending on production needs. 

🎥 PRODUCTION DETAILS 

Project currently in development, writing, and script editing stage. Selected applicants will take part in:
Rehearsals, Character development, Minor Stunt coordination (If Required) 

Refreshments and facilities will be provided during rehearsals and production. 

💼 COMPENSATION 

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements
upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued
with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.
❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:
Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing
Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. 

E-Mail: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.summary:
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms and entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere & Virdee. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. 

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT
The story centres young people from South Asian backgrounds living in the UK, and international students navigating life in Britain/Europe. 

This is a multi-layered narrative covering: 

- Identity & belonging
- Family dynamics & generational conflict
- Love, relationships & marriage
- Crime & survival in urban environments
- Cultural expectations & taboo subjects
- Personal ambition and redefining success 

Each character will have a deep backstory, with storylines unfolding across drama, suspense, humour, and realism.
The project has already been seen successfully as a Theatre Stage Play production tester and is currently being developed for an on-screen series, with potential partnerships across major streaming platforms such as Netflix UK, BBC Films, BFI Film Council, Channel 4, ITV X Studios, Film Four, HBO Max, Hulu, Mubi, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Facebook Watch, Sky Studios, Plex, Paramount Pictures Plus, Pluto TV, Now TV, Channel Five, Peacock, Eros Now and B4U Motion Pictures Studios. 

🎬 WHO WE ARE CASTING 

We are seeking British South Asian (Desi) Talents: 

Must be UK born or raised within the UK with Strong understanding of British South Asian culture, including Social issues & taboo topics, music, arts, entertainment and Community dynamics with lived experiences. 

Age Range: 

Open to all age groups
Experienced and None-Experienced 

All Genders Can Apply

📍 LOCATION 

Auditions, rehearsals, and filming will take place in London. Rehearsals held at a North London studio base. Some filming may occur in other UK locations depending on production needs. 

🎥 PRODUCTION DETAILS 

Project currently in development, writing, and script editing stage. Selected applicants will take part in:
Rehearsals, Character development, Minor Stunt coordination (If Required) 

Refreshments and facilities will be provided during rehearsals and production. 

💼 COMPENSATION 

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements
upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued
with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.
❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:
Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing
Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. 

E-Mail: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

items.text: Come join our Musical Theatre Master Class with David Burnham!

sharedPost.text:
There's only 1 participant spot left for our next Wisdom of the Masters Master Class with David Burnham! The class is a week from today on Monday April 6th at 7:00pm!

This is a wonderful opportunity for participants to work with and get feedback from an industry professional.

There are also observer spots available! Observers will not only have the invaluable and rare opportunity to "learn by watching", but the evening will also include a Q&A for all in attendance. 

Get tickets at: https://www.tix.com/ticket-sales/nosquare/1804

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL

CAST CALL
For
BIG BEAR LITTLE BEAR

We are looking for authentic, "lived-in" faces to populate the Museum of Human Failure.

Character is more important than "traditional" looks. We want people who look like
they’ve been awake since 1994 and are held together by spite and cheap tobacco.

Static is a 6 part series mockumentary, Shameless mixed with this Country just
more Raw and with way more ........Naughty Craziness .. the UC didnt Sanction

ROLES NEEDED The "Sovereign Citizens" & Background Actors

• Description: Men and women who look like they spend too much time on internet
  forums.
• Action: Carrying crumpled paperwork (Section 21s), whispering about "Maritime
  Law," or practicing with nunchucks.
• Wardrobe: Tactical gear mixed with pajamas, or "Neo from the Matrix" inspired
  thrift-store finds.
• The "Static" Residents (General Background)
• Description: All ages (18+). People who look weather-beaten and weary.
• Action: Gloomily standing in doorways, fighting over air fryers or gas canisters, or
  attempting to hotwire lawnmowers.
• Wardrobe: Worn-out dressing gowns (Blair-administration era), stained tracksuits,
  and Ugg boots.
• The "Food Outreach" Scramblers
• Description: High energy, "starving hyena" types.
• Action: A wildebeest-style stampede toward a delivery van; burrowing through
  crates of UHT milk and fighting over Fray Bentos tins.
• Physicality: Must be comfortable with light physical comedy (shoving, grabbing,
  scrambling).

APPLY TODAY 07368 607480

To be called to our cast call send over a 30 second self tape to whattsapp

Telling us why you would suit joining us on STATIC:

Filming Summer - Cast Call Manchester & West Midlands April 2026

 #actor #actorslife #caatingcall  #castingcallsunitedkingdom #officialcastingcallsuk #thecastingcallsuk #castingcallsuk

sharedPost.text:
CREW CALL: PRODUCTION ASSISTANTS – FASHION SHOW VENDOR OPPORTUNITY

#MAGEMotionPictures is seeking reliable and detail-oriented Production Assistants for an upcoming fashion show vendor opportunity.  Actors/Actresses are encouraged to apply.  

Date: Sunday, April 19th  
Time: 1:00 PM – 9:00 PM  
(May end sooner; full day rate will still be honored)

Location:  
Details will be provided upon signing of contract

Wardrobe / Dress Code:  
Business Casual Required
- Women: Combination colors of red, pink, and/or purple
- Men: All black with red, pink, or purple accent colors
- Overall appearance should remain clean, polished, and professional

Responsibilities May Include:
- Assisting with vendor setup and breakdown  
- Supporting backstage operations and coordination  
- Managing product flow and display areas  
- Providing general on-site production support  

Ideal Candidates:
- Punctual, professional, and proactive  
- Able to work in a fast-paced, high-energy environment  
- Strong communication and organizational skills  
- Prior event or production experience is a plus (but not required)

Compensation:  
Paid – Full day rate guaranteed

To Apply / Inquire:  
Email K. Dixon at kdmagestudio@gmail.com TODAY with your name, contact information, and any relevant experience.

Serious inquiries only. Let’s execute excellence.

items.text:
CASTING OPEN — THE ASK (RTN Raleigh)

We’re looking for real people with powerful, unforgettable life stories.

Not perfect stories.
Not polished ones.
Real ones.

If you’ve been through something that changed you —
this is your moment to be heard.

🎥 The Ask is a TV project airing on RTN (Raleigh Television Network).

📍 Filming takes place in Raleigh, North Carolina
📩 Send your story to: theaskoffice@gmail.com

Tell us who you are.
Tell us what you’ve been through.
Tell us why your story matters.

We’re not looking for “content”.
We’re looking for something real.

message.text: I am casting 2 PSA’s and Seeking Non-Union Actors with Acting Resumes to portray the following types:PSA #1:Elderly Man (75–85 open ethnicity) - Rate: $500Pharmacist (Male, 25–26 open ethnicity) - Rate: $500* Doctor (Black, 40’s any gender) - Rate: $300* Customer (Asian any gender, around 40) - Rate: $300* Worker (Female, open Ethnicity around 30) - Rate: $300PSA  #2: Elderly Woman (75–85): Rate: $500Mother (40): Middle Eastern or Latina preferred - Rate: $500Father (around 45): White - Rate: $500Teenage Boy (15): White - Rate: $500Woman (50): White - Rate: $500Man (around 50): White - Rate: $500Young Black Woman (20’s) - Rate: $500Black Man (around 30) - Rate: $500Middle-aged Asian Man - Rate: $500If you fit the bill please send an email to:JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.comSubj:  PSA - List RoleIncludeName, Cell, Email, Location, Photos, Resume, Reel (If available), VideosI will reply to emails with further instructions!These are paid roles.Filming in Greater BostonOne Day Between 4/3 & 4/7YOU MUST SUBMIT PER INSTRUCTIONS TO BE CONSIDERED.  COMMENTING ON POSTS IS NOT SUBMITTING #casting #commercial #$500 #$300 #principal #extra #jodipurdycasting

items.text:
Min bedstemor plejede at lave dette hvert år, men jeg glemte altid at skrive det ned. Jeg er så glad for, at jeg fandt noget, der lignede hendes!
Opskrift i kommentarerne. 

Jeg sendte den til dem, der takkede mig

items.text:
🎭 Children’s Drama Classes! 🎬
We’re excited to be launching more drama classes focused on acting for TV & Film right here in the local areas. Due to the success of the Beckenham sessions shown below, we will be opening more classes in Hayes and Orpington. 

These fun, confidence-building sessions are perfect for children who love performing, storytelling, or want to learn what it’s like to act on camera. 🌟

In our classes, students will learn:

🎬 Acting techniques for TV & Film

🎭 Improvisation and character work

📹 Camera confidence

✨ Communication and teamwork skills

Age Groups for Beckenham:

⭐️ 3-5 years

🧒 6–10 years

🎬 11–16 years

Age Groups for Orpington:

🧒 6–10 years

🎬 11–16 years

Age Groups for Hayes:

🧒 6–10 years

🎬 11–16 years

⭐️ 16-18

⚡ Visit our website to book or contact us. Limited spaces available.

If you’re a parent in Orpington, Beckenham, Bromley or Hayes and would like more information, send us a message and we’ll send over the details.

📧 agents@boomerangactors.com 

🎭 Spaces will be limited.

Hej!

Chorzów/Zabrze/Katowice/Oświęcim 

Szukamy 2–3 kobiet w wieku 27–30 lat do udziału w materiałach reklamowych dla sklepu z bielizną.

Zależy nam przede wszystkim na naturalnym pokazaniu naszej grupy docelowej – kobiecości, stylu i codziennych sytuacji. Udział nie wymaga pełnego występowania w bieliźnie – stawiamy na subtelność i estetykę.

Idealna szansa na zbudowanie portfolio ze względu na występ popularnych twarzy 

**Oferujemy:**

– udział w projekcie reklamowym - można użyć do swojego portfolio 

– dowolny zestaw bielizny do wyboru

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowana lub chcesz dowiedzieć się więcej – napisz wiadomość prywatną lub zostaw komentarz

items.text:
Looking for constructive feedback
hi everyone,

I have recently released my latest short film - Fatal Move 2: A Game of The Pieces 

As I am self produced, I do a lot of things myself (though my main roles are writer/director) 

I'd be happy for you to have a watch of my latest short film, and to give me any CONSTRUCTIVE feedback, so I can learn and implement for my next project 

I understand my film isn't perfect, for example;

The wind was against us on the day of filming, and the microphone was struggling - which lead to extended moments of ADR 

It was also my first time directing a choreographed fight scene, so that was a new learning experience for me

I made a producing error on the filming day, which resulted in a longer day and a lull of on set morale

Some thing I have learnt from this project is;

'make a *good* film, not a finished film.' so it is better to take your time on a film and make a good film, rather than just get it completed

It is not the editor's (mine) job to 'fix' footage. It should be better to get things as right as possible on production

if there's anything you feel I can further improve on from my film, please give it a watch and let me know 🙂

‼️ŚLĄSK: Katowice i okolice ‼️
🔥Zapraszamy na plan filmowy:🔥

KUMPLE Z PRACY (30-45 lat)
Data: 02.04 / czwartek - 2 sceny
Stawka: 300 zł

GOŚCIE RESTAURACJI (30-55 lat)
/Mile widziane pary :) /
Data: 04.04 / sobota - 2 sceny
Stawka: 200 zł

💲Stawki netto (do wypłaty) - płatne gotówką po planie💲

GRAMY: Katowice i okolice

➡️Zgłoszenia: marcin@mascaratmedia.com

W tytule prosimy wpisać nazwę roli do której Państwo się zgłaszają.

➡️Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:
1. Imię i nazwisko + wiek, waga,
2. aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki,
3. miasto zamieszkania,
4. krótkie info o doświadczeniu (+ np. video-wizytówka)
5. oraz oczywiście numer telefonu.

Serdecznie zapraszamy 😃

UWAGA: Zgłaszając się do danej roli, jest konieczność zarezerwowania całego dnia, ponieważ "godziny grania" i lokacja są podawane dzień wcześniej. (Wszystko do ustalenia drogą telefoniczną).

PS: Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
**Szukam modelki  Gliwice/Katowice ( Śląsk )**

 

Szukam pań które nie krępują się własnego ciała i chciałaby mieć ciekawą pamiątkę w postaci klimatycznych zdjęć. Wiem jak bardzo jest ważna akceptacja własnego ciała bo przez to też możemy inaczej funkcjonować. Przez takie zdjęcia można również tego dokonać. Sesja w głównej mierze jest jako taki motywator.

 

Zapraszam do Gliwic do mojego domowego mini studia foto na sesje tematyczne. Finalnie wychodzi  **od 15 do 20 zdjęć.** Do wyboru są 2 opcje tematyczne. Koszt takiej sesji to tylko **150 zł**. Posiadam na wyposażeniu mini studio z kilkoma tłami oraz lampami. Podpisuje również oświadczenie o wykonywanych zdjęciach w konkretny dzień sesji. Mam również duży wybór kostiumów i gadżetów do wykorzystywania:

** **

**Temat 1 – ‘’Kobieta mafii 1930’’**

Postać kobiety osadzona w 1930 roku w roli bogatej kobiety, która trudni się gangsterstwem. Przewidziane są ujęcia m.in. przy stoliku na którym są pieniądze, wino, rewolwer. Tło jest wydrukowane w formie muru, cegieł. Motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 2 – ‘’Wampirzyca w baroku 1700’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana najpierw w suknie czarną oraz peleryne z kapturem. Do tego czarna długa peruka oraz czarne paznokcie. W kolejnym etapie sesji motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 3 – ‘’Duchy lasu’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w wianek i w pelerynę z otwartym przodem. W dłoni ma zakrwawiony sierp. Usta czarne oraz paznokcie.

** **

**Temat 4 – ‘’Kleopatra’’**

Postać kobiety z czarna peruką w stylu Kleopatry. W prawej recę trzymac będzie berło Anubisa a w drugiej ręcę księgę umarłych. Na biodrach będzie mieć jedynie klasyczne odzienie z 2 części. Na klatce piersiowej założony będzie napierśnik złoty.

** **

**Temat 5 – ‘’Odważna Piratka ‘’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w strój piracki: kamizelka, koszula, kapelusz, spodnie i kapelusz a do tego rekwizyty pistolet czy kufel piwa.

 

**Temat 6 – ‘’Lara Croft ‘’**

Postać kobiety wzorowanej z tytułowej gry Tomb Rider Lary Croft.  Kobiete będzie przebywać w swojej bazie i badać nowe znaleziska pod lupą.

 

** **

**Zapraszam na stronę**

** **

**Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia**

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

Więcej informacji na Priv

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Kobieta Kobietamafi1930 mafii 1930 LaraCroft Lara Croft Duchy Duchylasu lasu Piratka Wampirzyca'

items.text:
Zapraszamy dzieci, młodzież i dorosłych na bezpłatne zajęcia próbne z chodzenia po wybiegu!

📅 Data: 2 kwietnia 2026
📍 Adres: Łódź, Moniuszki 4a
💸 Udział: bezpłatny

W naszej szkole rozpoczynają się regularne zajęcia z chodzenia po wybiegu i otwieramy nabór nowych uczestników!
Dlatego zapraszamy na zajęcia próbne, aby poznać atmosferę, trenera oraz formę zajęć.

Podczas zajęć:
✔️ nauczysz się prawidłowej postawy i chodzenia
✔️ spróbujesz swoich sił na wybiegu
✔️ popracujesz nad pewnością siebie i gracją

Zajęcia są odpowiednie dla każdego — niezależnie od wieku i doświadczenia.

✨ Zrób swój pierwszy krok w świat mody razem z nami!

**🎬 Szukam aktorów/aktorek do nagrań.**

Szukam osób do współpracy przy nagraniach w stylu UGC – nagrania telefonem, w warunkach domowych.

📍 Wymagania:
• wiek: 20–35 lat
• bardzo dobra znajomość języka angielskiego (nagrania w języku angielskim)
• swoboda przed kamerą

💰 Współpraca płatna

🎯 Tematyka: promocja produktu z branży health & wellness

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej + krótkie info o sobie lub portfolio (jeśli jest).

sharedPost.text:
PoBoy Films is casting for a dramatic short film exploring love, sacrifice, and impossible choices.

ROLES:
 • Elias (50s, African American)
 • Hale (45–60, Caucasian or Mixed)
 • Jonah & Noah (18–20, Black or Mixed)

This is a performance-driven, A24-style short with strong emotional depth and festival intentions.

📍 Bay Area
🎥 2-Day Shoot

Submit headshots, resume & reel to:
📩 poboyfilms@gmail.com

Serious inquiries only.

items.text: I aften lavede min svigermor aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg forhindrede også mine børn i at spise det. Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød inden tilberedning. Jeg kan ikke fatte, at hun ikke gør det. Er det ikke nødvendigt? Se detaljerne i den første kommentar.

items.text:
🎤 ⭐️ 𝐔𝐰𝐚𝐠𝐚! 𝐎𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐧𝐢 𝐭𝐲𝐝𝐳𝐢𝐞𝐧́ 𝐳𝐠ł𝐨𝐬𝐳𝐞𝐧́ 𝐝𝐨 𝐎𝐠𝐨́𝐥𝐧𝐨𝐩𝐨𝐥𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐞𝐠𝐨 𝐊𝐨𝐧𝐤𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐮 𝐖𝐨𝐤𝐚𝐥𝐧𝐞𝐠𝐨! 🥰

🎤 Złap oddech. Daj się ponieść głosowi.

⭐️ Zapraszamy solistów, duety i zespoły z całej Polski do udziału w wyjątkowym konkursie wokalnym, w którym pracujemy nad tym, co w śpiewie najważniejsze — świadomym oddechem i swobodnym prowadzeniem dźwięku.

Pokaż, jak Twój głos potrafi brzmieć, gdy daje mu się przestrzeń.
Nie liczy się wiek — liczy się pasja i chęć rozwoju.
Dołącz do nas i pozwól swojemu głosowi naprawdę wybrzmieć.
Zgłoszenia trwają już tylko 7 dni!

🏅 Na każdego uczestnika czeka dyplom, webinar oraz e-book na temat oddechu, a na laureatów I, II i III miejsca statuetki! ️

link do regulaminu: [https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../konkurs.../regulamin](https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../konkurs.../regulamin)

link do karty zgłoszenia: [https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../formularz-zgloszenia](https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../formularz-zgloszenia)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ZGŁOSZENIA DO:: LABORATORIUM DŻWIĘKÓW ZAPRASZA NA: OGÓLNOPOLSKI COLNOPOLSKLK KONKURS WOKALNY ODDECH KTÓRY NIESIE 03 KWIETNIA OSTATNI TYDZIEŃ ZGŁOSZEN Bo KAŻDY GŁOS ZACZYNA SIĘ OD ODDECHU.'

items.text:
‼️ UWAGA GÓRNY ŚLĄSK ‼️
Zapraszamy do udziału w fabularnym serialu kryminalnym, realizowanym na terenie Górnego Śląska. 🔥 Gwarantujemy fajną zabawę i świetną atmosferę - SERDECZNIE ZAPRASZAMY❗️

Jeśli masz mocny, charakterystyczny wygląd — to może być coś dla Ciebie.

❇️ KOGO ZAPRASZAMY: groźne wyglądających Panów (w wieku ok. 35-55 lat), mile widziane tatuaże i umięśnienie, mogą być także blizny (do zagrania są 3 sceny, plan dzienny).

✅ KIEDY i GDZIE:

31.03 (wt.), plan w MIKOŁOWIE (10 min spacerem od dworca PKP).

💰WYNAGRODZENIE za udział w planie:  300 zł netto, płatne po planie.

⬇️ KOMPLETNE ZGŁOSZENIE zawierające poniższe dane, wyślij:

📲 WhatsApp / SMS: +48 660 543 967

📩 e-mail: 123cast.serial@gmail.com

📌 Tytuł zgłoszenia: „Areszt 31.03”

W mailu / komunikatorze podaj wszystkie poniższe dane, dokładnie wg. tej formatki ⬇️:

—

* Imię i nazwisko

* Nr telefonu

* E-mail

* Miejsce zamieszkania

* Datę urodzenia

* Wzrost (cm)

* Wagę (kg)

* Rozmiar obuwia (EU)

📸 Dołącz 2 aktualne zdjęcia:

* portret;

* sylwetka.

Zdjęcia powinny być zrobione telefonem:

❌ bez innych osób w kadrze;

❌ bez okularów;

❌ bez nakrycia głowy.

⚠️  UWAGA, odezwiemy się do wybranych w procesie castingowym osób.

Do zobaczenia na planie 🎬

—

𝘗𝘩𝘰𝘵𝘰 𝘣𝘺 𝘔𝘪𝘭𝘢𝘥 𝘍𝘢𝘬𝘶𝘳𝘪𝘢𝘯 𝘰𝘯 𝘜𝘯𝘴𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘴𝘩, 𝘮𝘢𝘥𝘦 𝘣𝘺 𝘌𝘔.

items.text:
Hi there

Fifth Wall Theatre Company is producing a professional profit share production of Hedda Gabler July 2-4 at The Blue Room in Lincoln.

Auditions are on April 14th onwards.

I have attached an audition pack and please call/whatsapp me on 07812 169446.

Thanks a lot

Tim

http://theatreandartreviews.com/2026/04/01/victoria-a-queen-unbound-the-watermill-theatre/
